task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Role-Based Access Control** (Level 8)

Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a
final_source:
build for javascript backend

allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@test.com'

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create an Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

# Register endpoint
when user calls POST /api/register sending user_data:
  save user_data to Users
  send back user_data with status 201

# Login endpoint
when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  response_data is { message is 'Login successful', token is 'test-token' }
  send back response_data with status 200

# Create article - editors and admins only
when user calls POST /api/articles sending article_data:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or caller's role is 'editor' or 'Only admins and editors can create articles'
  set article_data's author_id to caller's id
  save article_data to Articles
  send back article_data with status 201

# Delete article - admins only
when user calls DELETE /api/articles/:id:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or 'Only admins can delete articles'
  remove from Articles with this id
  send back { deleted is true } with status 200

# List articles - authenticated users only
when user calls GET /api/articles:
  requires login
  articles = get all Articles
  send back articles with status 200
